Preterit.turoyo: U zlam nafәl mi goro mpalpxi ag garmayḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations: The man fell from the roof his bones broke.

Infectum.turoyo: Mәd ak kalbe d kәmqatli kompalpxi ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations: When the dogs fight they beat up each other.

Infectum-wa.turoyo: Azzino li šuqo, ḥzeli tre zlamat mpalpxiwa ḥḏoḏe.

Preterit.turoyo: 1.aḥ ḥәmṣe mpaxpxi ʕal u dawqo. (ilyas p.c)
translations: Chickpeans burst open on a frying pan.

Infectum.turoyo: 1. Mәd až žabaš d komoṭәn komipaxpxi. (İlyas p.c)
translations: When watermelons become ripe they split open/ burst.

Infectum.turoyo: 3. Ag garme das sowe komipaxpxi. The bones of old people break.
